[Southern Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 324/26
GERMAN NAV WARN 324/26.
SOUTHERN BALTIC. NORTHWEST OF WINDPARK 'BALTIC EAGLE'.
GEOTECHNICAL OPERATIONS BY MV 'FUGRO PIONEER', CS 'C6BH3'
AROUND PSN 54-52,8N 013-46,0E.
RESTRICTED MANEUVERABILITY DURING OPERATIONS.
A SAFETY DISTANCE OF 1,5 NM IS REQUIRED
